body.description: Worker sustained crush injury to right hand and wrist from equipment malfunction on active job site. Incident occurred at 14th floor construction site on West 57th St, Manhattan. Worker transported to Bellevue Hospital, surgery scheduled. Three additional workers witnessed the incident. OSHA notification filed. Equipment quarantined pending inspection. Worker employed 3 years, no prior injury claims. Medical prognosis: 8-12 weeks recovery, possible permanent partial disability.

Worker transported to Bellevue Hospital, surgery scheduled. Three additional workers witnessed the incident. OSHA notification filed. Equipment quarantined pending inspection. Worker employed 3 years, no prior injury claims. Medical prognosis: 8-12 weeks recovery, possible permanent partial disability.

json.prompt:
You are an expert insurance claims analyst. Analyze the following claim submission and return a structured JSON response.

CLAIM SUBMISSION:
---
Claim ID: CLM-2026-0848
Policy Number: POL-BIZ-44512
Claimant: Sullivan Construction Group
Date of Loss: 2026-03-02
Claim Type: workers_compensation
Description: Worker sustained crush injury to right hand and wrist from equipment malfunction on active job site. Incident occurred at 14th floor construction site on West 57th St, Manhattan. Worker transported to Bellevue Hospital, surgery scheduled. Three additional workers witnessed the incident. OSHA notification filed. Equipment quarantined pending inspection. Worker employed 3 years, no prior injury claims. Medical prognosis: 8-12 weeks recovery, possible permanent partial disability.
Estimated Loss: $285,000
Location: Manhattan, NY
---

Return ONLY valid JSON with this exact structure:
{
  "priority": "CRITICAL" | "HIGH" | "STANDARD" | "LOW",
  "claim_category": "property_damage" | "liability" | "auto" | "workers_comp" | "commercial" | "other",
  "extracted_fields": {
    "primary_cause": "string — one line root cause",
    "affected_parties": "string — who is impacted",
    "estimated_severity": "string — dollar range or severity descriptor",
    "coverage_flags": ["array of coverage areas that likely apply"],
    "red_flags": ["array of fraud indicators or unusual elements, empty if none"],
    "missing_info": ["array of critical missing fields needed to process"]
  },
  "recommended_specialist": "property_adjuster" | "liability_specialist" | "auto_adjuster" | "workers_comp_specialist" | "fraud_investigator" | "senior_adjuster",
  "sla_hours": 2 | 4 | 8 | 24 | 48,
  "confidence": 0.0–1.0,
  "reasoning": "2–3 sentence explanation of priority decision and key risk factors",
  "claimant_message": "1–2 sentence professional acknowledgment message for the claimant — empathetic, clear, no legal admissions"
}

Priority rules:
- CRITICAL: Estimated loss >$500K, injury claims, active liability exposure, fraud flags
- HIGH: Estimated loss $100K–$500K, commercial property, multiple parties
- STANDARD: Residential property <$100K, single claimant, clear documentation
- LOW: Minor claims <$10K, straightforward, complete documentation

message.content:
{
  "priority": "CRITICAL",
  "claim_category": "workers_comp",
  "extracted_fields": {
    "primary_cause": "Equipment malfunction causing crush injury to worker's hand/wrist",
    "affected_parties": "Sullivan Construction Group employee, potential equipment manufacturer liability",
    "estimated_severity": "$285,000 with potential for increase due to surgical intervention and PPD",
    "coverage_flags": [
      "workers_compensation",
      "medical expenses",
      "disability benefits",
      "potential third-party liability",
      "OSHA involvement"
    ],
    "red_flags": [],
    "missing_info": [
      "Employee name and ID",
      "Equipment make/model details",
      "Current employment status",
      "Witness statements"
    ]
  },
  "recommended_specialist": "workers_comp_specialist",
  "sla_hours": 4,
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "reasoning": "Classified as CRITICAL due to severe workplace injury requiring surgery and potential permanent disability, despite loss estimate below $500K threshold. High-risk construction site incident with OSHA involvement and potential third-party liability from equipment malfunction increases claim complexity. Multiple witnesses and preserved evidence support swift investigation.",
  "claimant_message": "We have received your workers' compensation claim and understand the serious nature of the injury. A dedicated workers' compensation specialist will be assigned immediately and will contact you within 4 business hours to coordinate next steps and ensure proper medical care coordination."
}

json.message: Claim #CLM-2026-0848 triaged as CRITICAL. Assigned to Sandra Mills (Workers Comp). SLA: 4 hours.

workflowData.name: AI Insurance Claims Triage & Document Extraction — Demo

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ "text": "🚨 *" + $('Assign Specialist').item.json.priority + " CLAIM* — #" + $('Assign Specialist').item.json.claim_id + "
*Claimant:* " + $('Assign Specialist').item.json.claimant_name + " | *Type:* " + $('Assign Specialist').item.json.claim_category + "
*Est. Loss:* " + $('Assign Specialist').item.json.estimated_loss + " | *SLA:* " + $('Assign Specialist').item.json.sla_hours + "h
*Assigned to:* " + $('Assign Specialist').item.json.assigned_specialist_name + " (" + $('Assign Specialist').item.json.assigned_queue + ")
*AI Reasoning:* " + ($('Assign Specialist').item.json.reasoning || '').substring(0, 200) + "
*Red Flags:* " + (($('Assign Specialist').item.json.extracted_fields?.red_flags || []).join(', ') || 'None') }) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ '🚨 [' + $('Assign Specialist').item.json.priority + '] New Claim #' + $('Assign Specialist').item.json.claim_id + ' — ' + $('Assign Specialist').item.json.claim_category.replace('_',' ').toUpperCase() }}
parameters.message:
=

{{ $('Assign Specialist').item.json.priority }} Priority Claim

SLA Deadline: {{ new Date(Date.now() + $('Assign Specialist').item.json.sla_hours * 3600000).toLocaleString() }}

Claim ID:{{ $('Assign Specialist').item.json.claim_id }}
Policy #:{{ $('Assign Specialist').item.json.policy_number }}
Claimant:{{ $('Assign Specialist').item.json.claimant_name }}
Date of Loss:{{ $('Assign Specialist').item.json.date_of_loss }}
Estimated Loss:{{ $('Assign Specialist').item.json.estimated_loss }}
Location:{{ $('Assign Specialist').item.json.location }}

AI-Extracted Analysis

Primary Cause: {{ $('Assign Specialist').item.json.extracted_fields?.primary_cause || 'Not determined' }}

Affected Parties: {{ $('Assign Specialist').item.json.extracted_fields?.affected_parties || 'Unknown' }}

Estimated Severity: {{ $('Assign Specialist').item.json.extracted_fields?.estimated_severity || 'Unknown' }}

Coverage Flags:
    {{ ($('Assign Specialist').item.json.extracted_fields?.coverage_flags || []).map(f => '
  • ' + f + '
    • ').join('') || '
  • None identified
    • ' }}
{{ ($('Assign Specialist').item.json.extracted_fields?.red_flags || []).length > 0 ? '
⚠️ Red Flags:
    ' + $('Assign Specialist').item.json.extracted_fields.red_flags.map(f => '
  • ' + f + '
    • ').join('') + '
' : '' }} {{ ($('Assign Specialist').item.json.extracted_fields?.missing_info || []).length > 0 ? '
📋 Missing Information:
    ' + $('Assign Specialist').item.json.extracted_fields.missing_info.map(f => '
  • ' + f + '
    • ').join('') + '
' : '' }}

Confidence Score: {{ Math.round(($('Assign Specialist').item.json.confidence || 0) * 100) }}%

{{ $('Assign Specialist').item.json.reasoning || 'No reasoning provided.' }}

Assigned to: {{ $('Assign Specialist').item.json.assigned_specialist_name }} — {{ $('Assign Specialist').item.json.assigned_queue }}

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $('Assign Specialist').item.json;

const summary = {
  status: 'processed',
  claim_id: data.claim_id,
  priority: data.priority,
  claim_category: data.claim_category,
  claimant_name: data.claimant_name,
  estimated_loss: data.estimated_loss,
  assigned_to: data.assigned_specialist_name,
  queue: data.assigned_queue,
  sla_hours: data.sla_hours,
  confidence: data.confidence,
  reasoning: data.reasoning,
  red_flags: data.extracted_fields?.red_flags || [],
  processing_timestamp: data.processing_timestamp,
  message: `Claim #${data.claim_id} triaged as ${data.priority}. Assigned to ${data.assigned_specialist_name} (${data.assigned_queue}). SLA: ${data.sla_hours} hours.`
};

return [{ json: summary }];

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ "text": "📋 *New Claim* — #" + $('Parse Triage Result').item.json.claim_id + " (" + $('Parse Triage Result').item.json.priority + ")
*Claimant:* " + $('Parse Triage Result').item.json.claimant_name + " | *Type:* " + $('Parse Triage Result').item.json.claim_category + "
*Est. Loss:* " + $('Parse Triage Result').item.json.estimated_loss + "
*Queue:* Standard Processing | *SLA:* " + $('Parse Triage Result').item.json.sla_hours + "h
*Summary:* " + ($('Parse Triage Result').item.json.reasoning || '').substring(0, 150) }) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Claim #' + $('Parse Triage Result').item.json.claim_id + ' — Received & In Review' }}
parameters.message:
=

Claim Received

Dear {{ $('Parse Triage Result').item.json.claimant_name }},

{{ $('Parse Triage Result').item.json.claimant_message }}

Claim Reference: {{ $('Parse Triage Result').item.json.claim_id }}

Date of Loss: {{ $('Parse Triage Result').item.json.date_of_loss }}

Expected Response: Within {{ $('Parse Triage Result').item.json.sla_hours }} hours

Please keep this reference number for your records. You can reply to this email if you have additional information to provide.

Sincerely,
Claims Processing Team

This is an automated message. Please do not reply directly to this email.

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $('Parse Triage Result').item.json;

const summary = {
  status: 'processed',
  claim_id: data.claim_id,
  priority: data.priority,
  claim_category: data.claim_category,
  claimant_name: data.claimant_name,
  estimated_loss: data.estimated_loss,
  assigned_to: 'Standard Queue',
  queue: 'Standard Processing',
  sla_hours: data.sla_hours,
  confidence: data.confidence,
  reasoning: data.reasoning,
  red_flags: data.extracted_fields?.red_flags || [],
  processing_timestamp: data.processing_timestamp,
  message: `Claim #${data.claim_id} triaged as ${data.priority}. Queued for standard processing. SLA: ${data.sla_hours} hours.`
};

return [{ json: summary }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ "text": "❌ *Claims Workflow Error*\n" + $('Log Error Details').item.json.error_message + "\n*Timestamp:* " + $('Log Error Details').item.json.timestamp }) }}
